name: Spiced Cherry Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix together the sugar, margarine, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Gradually add in the flour and mix until a dough forms.
4. Stir in the nutmeg and chopped almonds.
5. Form the dough into a rectangle on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Cut the rectangle into 1/2-inch strips lengthwise.
7. Place the strips cut-side down on the baking sheet, about 1 inch apart.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned and crisp.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely before turning off the heat.
